issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.

scenarios.name: Load a 7B model on a single GPU with limited VRAM
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses AutoModelForCausalLM with torch_dtype=float16, device_map="auto", and load_in_4bit, matching the skill's quantization pattern that baseline only partially mentioned.

scenarios.name: Fine-tune DistilBERT on IMDB with the Trainer API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the skill's full Trainer recipe (TrainingArguments with eval_strategy/save_strategy/fp16, compute_metrics, tokenized dataset.map) while baseline writes a custom PyTorch loop.
